topics.name: cmd_vel_teleop
topics.description: Teleop velocity command. Takes priority over cmd_vel_automated whenever a fresh teleop message has arrived within teleop_timeout_s.

topics.name: cmd_vel_automated
topics.description: Autonomy or scripted velocity command. Used only when no recent teleop message is present.

topics.name: front_left_motor
topics.description: Front-left wheel angular velocity (rad/s) derived from the active cmd_vel and the configured kinematics.

topics.name: rear_left_motor
topics.description: Rear-left wheel angular velocity (rad/s). Mirrors front_left_motor on a standard 4-wheel diff-drive base.

topics.name: front_right_motor
topics.description: Front-right wheel angular velocity (rad/s) derived from the active cmd_vel and the configured kinematics.

topics.name: rear_right_motor
topics.description: Rear-right wheel angular velocity (rad/s). Mirrors front_right_motor on a standard 4-wheel diff-drive base.

wheel_separation.label: Wheel Separation
wheel_separation.description: Distance between left and right wheels in meters.

teleop_timeout_s.label: Teleop Timeout
teleop_timeout_s.description: Seconds without a teleop message before falling back to automated commands.
